headline: Nvidia CEO sends serious wake up call to all Americans
summary: In March 2026, federal prosecutors charged the co-founder of Supermicro with masterminding a $2.5 billion scheme to smuggle Nvidia-equipped servers to China through front companies, forged documents, and dummy servers staged to fool auditors. Jensen Huang had been watching this unfold for months. ...

headline: Supermicro Stock Jumps on Wall Street Upgrade. The Real Test Is Still Ahead.
summary: SMCI stock surged after a bullish analyst upgrade, but investors are now focused on whether earnings can justify growing expectations around AI infrastructure demand.

headline: GF Securities Upgrades Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Stock to Buy
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ:SMCI) is one of the Most Promising AI Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next 2 Years. On June 22, GF Securities upgraded the company’s stock to “Buy” with a price objective of $48. As per the analyst Evan Lee, while the upcoming ~15% dilution has impacted the company’s stock […]

headline: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Is Up 5.8% After New Edge AI And Sovereign Infrastructure Push
summary: In late June 2026, StorMagic and Odine each announced collaborations with Super Micro Computer to bundle its compact edge servers with virtualization software and to deploy its NVIDIA-based GPU infrastructure for AI factories in Türkiye, while Supermicro itself expanded its Intel-powered AI edge portfolio for industrial and office environments. Together, these moves highlight Supermicro’s effort to extend its AI infrastructure franchise beyond hyperscale data centers into distributed edge,...
